cost_name: Civil & Construction — Alkaline Greenfield — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: IRENA 2024 scaled for Alkaline footprint (~80 m²/MW vs PEM 50 m²/MW). +60% building area, +40% earthworks, additional KOH electrolyte storage building. Alkaline civil premium ~€60/kW vs PEM at 100 MW scale.

confidence.rationale: Alkaline's larger footprint is a well-documented characteristic (TC-ALK-001). Civil cost differential is proportional to area and equipment count.

primary_drivers: KOH electrolyte storage building and containment
Additional pipe racks for electrolyte circulation
